title: Ethinyl Estradiol and Levonorgestrel (Oral Contraceptives): MedlinePlus Drug Information
text:
acne in certain patients. Oral contraceptives treat acne by decreasing the amounts of certain natural substances that can cause acne.
This medication may be prescribed for other uses; ask your doctor or pharmacist for more information.
What special precautions should I follow? 
Before taking ethinyl estradiol and levonorgestrel oral contraceptives, tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are allergic to this drug, any part of this drug, or any other 
drugs, foods or substances. 
Tell your doctor or pharmacist about the allergy and what 
symptoms you had. you should know that some medications should not be taken with ethinyl estradiol and levonorgestrel oral contraceptives. 
Make sure you have discussed any medications you are currently taking or plan to take before starting ethinyl estradiol and levonorgestrel oral contraceptives with your doctor and pharmacist. 
Before starting, stopping, or changing any medications while taking ethinyl estradiol and levonorgestrel oral contraceptives, please get the advice of your doctor or pharmacist.you should also know that some medications may decrease the effectiveness of oral contraceptives (birth control pills). 
You will need to use another method of contraception to prevent pregnancy while taking these drugs together. Talk to your doctor about other ways to prevent pregnancy while you are taking this medication. the following nonprescr
